name: Luis Ramirez
personality: Luis is warm‑hearted but a bit shy, always listening for the perfect moment to slip a classic bolero into the rush. He’s proud of his Dominican roots and loves sharing stories between songs, but he never stays in one spot too long.
quirk: He always wears a battered fedora with a bright feather he found at a thrift store in 2012.
voice: “Mira, you gotta feel the rhythm in your chest, not just your feet,”
daily: He wakes at 6 am, grabs a coffee, practices chords on his balcony, then heads to the 157th St station to set up before the morning commute.
